name: Perpetual Markets Strategist AI Public
short_description: Elite crypto perpetuals analyst and conversational trade strategy agent.
description:
## Overview
Perpetual Markets Strategist AI analyzes crypto perpetual markets through natural-language conversation. It combines technical indicators, chart structure, volatility, funding, basis, open interest, volume, and sentiment signals to help users understand what is happening, what may happen next, and how a trade should be planned.

## Core Functions
- Full perpetual-market analysis
- Chart reading and support/resistance mapping
- Probabilistic forecasts and sentiment summaries
- Complete trade plans with entry, stop, targets, invalidation, sizing, and timing
- Structured market-data extraction
- Guarded execution planning with dry-run behavior by default

## Operating Parameters
- Markets: crypto perpetual pairs such as BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, and SOLUSDT
- Methods: EMA/SMA, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, ATR, VWAP, stochastic, funding, basis, open interest, and volume
- Interaction style: natural-language conversation without fixed command syntax
- Safety: live execution is disabled unless exchange credentials, max notional limits, and explicit confirmation are configured
- Pricing: first query free where supported, then 0.5 USDC/query and 1.5 USDC for data extraction

capabilities.name: perpetual_market_analysis
capabilities.description: Analyzes crypto perpetual markets using trend, momentum, volatility, volume, funding, basis, and open-interest signals.

capabilities.name: chart_reading
capabilities.description: Reads chart structure, candlestick behavior, support and resistance, range position, and volatility context.

capabilities.name: strategy_builder
capabilities.description: Creates complete trade plans with direction, entry zone, stop, targets, invalidation, sizing, timing, and execution logic.

capabilities.name: market_sentiment
capabilities.description: Interprets market sentiment from funding, basis, volume, open interest, and momentum context.

capabilities.name: data_extraction
capabilities.description: Produces structured market-data summaries for deeper analysis and reporting.

faq_items.question: What can this agent do?
faq_items.answer: It analyzes perpetual markets, reads charts, summarizes sentiment, produces forecasts, and builds full trade plans in natural language.

faq_items.question: How is pricing handled?
faq_items.answer: The intended pricing is first query free where supported, then 0.5 USDC per normal query and 1.5 USDC for data extraction.

faq_items.question: Can it place live trades?
faq_items.answer: It is designed to stay guarded by default. Live execution should only be enabled after exchange credentials, notional limits, and explicit confirmation controls are configured.
